should_trigger: Review this AUR PKGBUILD and decide if it is ready to publish
Run the /release-aur plan for my package repo
Create a new AUR package repository for this GitHub project
should_not_trigger: Publish an npm package from this monorepo
Compare package manager libraries for a Rust project

ambiguous.prompt: An AUR package build fails on Arch after a dependency update
ambiguous.decision: Use release-aur if the target is PKGBUILD/release readiness; use arch-linux-local if the failure is a local system package manager issue.
ambiguous.reason: AUR workflows sit on top of Arch packaging and can overlap with general Arch troubleshooting.

notes: AUR package creation, review, and publishing decisions should route here before general Arch troubleshooting.
